transcript: Hey bro, you wanna go to Carl's Jr. for lunch? Yeah man, I'm down. I'll just get the charbroiled chicken club, no bacon or sauce. Let's go ahead and do a side salad with the light balsamic and a Diet Coke. Dang, where did you learn to order like that? You must not be following Seth G. I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G right now.
caption:
Comment “FASTFOOD” for my fast food swaps cheat sheet

Carl's Jr order this: Charbroil chicken club, no bacon or sauce, side salad with light balsamic & a Diet Coke (440 calories 33 G protein)

This order will save you well over 1000 cal and keep you on track on your fitness journey
ocr_text: Carls Jr 2310 CALORIES 69 G PROTEIN 440 CALORIES 33 G PROTEIN
visual_scenes: Two men in studio with Carl's Jr branding. Comparing standard order (2310 cal) vs swap (440 cal). Animated poses and gestures. Profile card CTA at end.
creator: @sethgolie

parsed.swap_meal: Charbroiled Chicken Club no bacon no sauce, side salad with light balsamic, Diet Coke
parsed.notes: Single restaurant swap. Saves 1870 calories. 440 cal, 33g protein.
